sentences.arabic: شَعَرَ عِمَادٌ بِدُوَارٍ وَجَلَسَ عَلَى الْأَرِيكَةِ.
sentences.translation: Imad je osjetio vrtoglavicu i sjeo na kauč.
sentences.translationEn: Imad felt dizzy and sat on the sofa.

sentences.arabic: تَذَكَّرَ أَنَّهُ لَمْ يَأْكُلْ شَيْئًا مُنْذُ الصَّبَاحِ.
sentences.translation: Sjetio se da od jutra nije ništa jeo.
sentences.translationEn: He remembered that he had not eaten anything since morning.

sentences.arabic: أَكَلَ تُفَّاحَةً وَشَرِبَ كُوبًا مِنَ الْعَصِيرِ.
sentences.translation: Pojeo je jabuku i popio čašu soka.
sentences.translationEn: He ate an apple and drank a glass of juice.

sentences.arabic: بَعْدَ قَلِيلٍ زَالَ الدُّوَارُ وَشَعَرَ بِتَحَسُّنٍ.
sentences.translation: Ubrzo je vrtoglavica prošla i osjetio se bolje.
sentences.translationEn: After a short while the dizziness went away and he felt better.
